text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Nothin' beats a hot bath at the local
bathhouse after workin' up a good sweat! Pure
heaven!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: What's the deal?! This water's lukewarm!

text_block_list.name: Bathhouse Lady
text_block_list.text:
Sorry 'bout that, Inari. Looks like the darn thing is
busted. We've got the repair people comin'
tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Gah! I'd rather jump in an ice-cold tub! The gods
sure are merciless.
